reviews.review_title: I absolutely love this game despite bugs
reviews.review_description:
I always wanted to play football.. I ran around the house as a little kid on football Sunday with my football diving over the back of the couch like Bo Jackson, Marcus Allen and Barry Sanders.... I've been loving this game the past weeks I bought it. I play it almost every day.  Yes, it has annoying bugs, but I've never felt more like I'm playing NFL football until this game.  I wish that when you scr3w up a hand off and pick the ball back up the defenders actually chase you... I actually ran out of bounds and the play kept going (something weird seems to happen if you fumble a hand off and pick it back up)  I finally ran up to a defender so he would tackle me because I am in it for the challenge not to exploit the holes in the game that people will do to so they can brag.  The feeling of managing to get an interception of defense is amazing.  I really hope all the problems are fixed (and an indicator when you are being blocked would be great) .... I am loving playing games in the season and having a good time.  Amazing game, just keep improving it.  I'll buy more packs to help keep the game developing, such as other positions, etc.

Seriously scr3wing up is a profanity?

Update
Will this ever be updated?  Will the bugs be fixed or this another, "F*ck you I got my money type situation?  Or are you waiting for AI to do it?  Sigh.  Profanity filters make me laugh.  So stupid.

Alright the bugs in the game aren't being fixed.  Sigh.  I retract the above.

The game play is good and the throwing is solid then you see the rosters and there correct. Now lets get to what they need to add different positions like running back tight end receiver so we can see what it looks like. Its a good game with some flows but its mainly good.

Cut to the chase we need a wide receiver mode. Also, we might need some bug fixes with the wide receivers in story mode. Also, please add like a reporting system to the game. Just please update the game and make it better again.

This game is really fun but it could use some effort the faces look the same but that is fine, but can you put the real names on the people not random ones the name of the player at that position. Can you also make a WR or RB but overall this game is good

reviews.review_title: Great game, but a few tweaks are needed
reviews.review_description:
Don’t get me wrong, this is one of, if not the best vr football game I have played. However, this game does have a couple of bugs that I would like to address. We’ll start with defense. Firstly, if the opponent calls a run play, the center is programmed to run out in front, usually blocking the player. This then results in the player not being allowed to move until the next huddle. This gets annoying since reading run plays is super fun, but it makes getting into the backfield to stop inside runs almost impossible (at least for me). Second, and I think this is just a feature, but whenever I line up too close to the line of scrimmage, the game thrusts me back a few yards. I would understand how this prevents players from just running up the middle to the qb every time, but I think that should just be up to the players. If they want to be boring, let them. However, it should not affect things like press coverage or edge rushing (or any kind of rushing). Finally, I have no idea how the in-air pass breakup works. Do you have to hit the ball with your hand, do you need to press a specific button, or is it something else? Being able to swat is a good feature, it just doesn’t work for me. I could probably successfully swat a pass around 2-3 times in 50 passes (this also might just be a skill issue). Now to offense. To start, the run game kinda sucks. As soon as the ball gets handed off, the are at least 6 defenders already clogging up the holes to run through. Run plays can get from -2 to 15 yards, and it usually lands between -2 and 3. Next, receivers stop running their routes. Now, this is a normal thing to do, and I appreciate that it happens. However, once they run out of places to go, they just start walking. If you try to throw to them, they won’t do anything, and it ruins playmaking a ton. Also, while on the topic of routes, if you’re near the end zone and call a post, slant, corner, or any other diagonal route, the receiver on that route will likely just run out of the back of the end zone, removing a possible target for points (and the out of bounds hitboxes/triggers are horrible. I could be basically straddling the sideline and not get called out of bounds. There are also moments on defense where the receiver catches the ball near the sideline and is clearly out of bounds, but they either call it a catch or keep running). The offensive line also sucks. On the hardest difficulty, you have about 1-4 seconds to throw the ball, or you either get sacked or are forced to run. The line should block for a little longer in my opinion, simply because the routes don’t get open that quick. These next few are either things to change or add/remove. The implementation of coach trust was good on paper, but is actually not good for newer players. It reduces their ability to play the game in a fun way, for all skill levels. Not being able to go for it on 4th downs unless the offensive coordinator decides to is so boring. Also, the speed boost is confusing to me. Is there an actual speed boost button that I don’t know, does it just let you run at top speed for longer, does it make you faster, or is it multiple things? Another thing is not being able to audible. If I misclick and call the wrong play and I haven’t unlocked audibles, there’s nothing I can do except for call a timeout. Basically, either change or remove the coach trust. That’s all I can think of, so I’ll give a brief summary, since you probably got tired of my constant yapping: 
1: There is a bug where the center permanently block you for the play on a run play
2: Remove the force that pushes you back if you are too close to the line of scrimmage
3: Improve the swatting
4: Make running the ball easier and better
5: Make the receivers keep running instead of giving up
6: Prevent receivers from running out the back of the end zone
7: Fix the sideline hitboxes
8: Make the offensive line better
9: Adjust coach trust to be easier on new players
BONUS: Make the user team’s defense more aware
Once again, sorry about the yapping

I enjoy playing this game closest game in vr to real life football feel but I have some ideas for the devs if they end up reading this 


Fast play setting -
There should be a setting or something to make the defense and players overall faster or maybe have us pick a speed but I feel like that’s a big thing missing in this one that could make a difference in the next.

Coaching mode-
There should be a coach mode added where we can maybe create a playbook or even just let us pick our favorite plays already in the game and we put them together for a team we would like to lead to a Super Bowl have us watch from the sidelines like a real coach.

More positions-
We need more positions to play in the game I understand that a qb probably the best one to play but I’m sure people want to try out an rb or te just for fun.

Free agency-
Maybe add a free agency after playing our years on a team we choose the we can sign on another team that may have interest in us or just resign with the team we are on.

Draft-
It would be would be cool to let us go through like a combine experience before joining a team maybe a optional thing incase people want to just pick the team they want to play on and then we get drafted by random depending how we do on combine.


I know this is a lot to ask but if you even add a few of these things would take the game to the next level it needs to go

I know this is unlikely but it would make this much better if you could add hurdling and flags, it'll be hard, but it'll be fun. You'll get way more players and it'll be a much better game it will be more enjoyable and more realistic. Everybody always dreams about being a big star, why not give them that chance in a realistic virtual headset? 
￼

tar — Where’s NFL Pro Era 2026
I had hopes for this fall. I’m disappointed there’s been no trailer, update, or official timeline yet. The game showed a lot of promise, and I’m still eager to play, but the lack of communication has been frustrating.
If StatusPro needs more time, a brief update or revised window would go a long way toward keeping fans engaged. Clear, respectful communication builds trust even when delays happen.
I’m rooting for the team and the series — please keep the community in the loop so anticipation can grow instead of fade. Until then, I can’t give this a positive rating.

reviews.review_title: Please update the game more often.
reviews.review_description: It’s a good game, the best nfl experience in football, but the lack of inconsistent updates just make it worse. Fix bugs in multiplayer, and in single player, add head 2 head which you have done before in the old version of Pro Era. Why can’t I play CB on defense, I can only play linebacker, why can’t I play as defensive end of safety? On offense, why can’t I play running back, or wide receiver. In single player, please fix how the running backs work, it’s annoying when your rb gets an average gain of 1 on 20 carries, especially with good running backs. Also add the AI to be smarter, in my entire experience in this game, the AI on defense is terrible, they always drop the ball, blow up coverage and let the wr make plays on them. Also make them tackle on the first try and please add a better chance of fumbles on defense. On offense,why does the wr always find a way to not even try to catch a ball. On multiplayer, make the catching better, it’s frustrating when someone catches the ball while it is high in the air. And lastly please add teammate interactions, you did it last time in the old pro era, like fist bumps or small talk, it just seems like I’m just running around with ghost teammates, extremely weird and boring. Shem is great but it needs updates asap.
People are hating because you can’t play multiple players but ngl it’s still super fun and you can try thousands of different plays so don’t listen to haters 👍🏻

The game is amazing itself, but I got one thing that they need to add and I didn’t even sent this in their Instagram. I texted in their DM’s that they need to add this thing called a position pack that would be like 15 $20 where you could choose your position on field in season games instead of just being a linebacker and a QB you could be like a receiver of running back you could be a quarterback a safety. I feel like everyone would like this in the game on their update 3.0.15 just some recommendation but other than that the game is fine multiplayer it’s good. I feel like they need to have this mode and multiplayer where you could have a one V one mode do you know kind of like how you can one if you want already like you could have this mode where one to receiver one DB and an AIQB or a real QB like a human and then a receiver DB and then they switch a recommendation the game is amazing. I love the game.

reviews.review_title: Let a real developer own this title
reviews.review_description: This developer really made a football game and thought “huh, I bet it would be such a cool and innovative idea if we made an NFL vr game but here’s the fun part……. you can only play 1 skill position!” Like what tard decided that being only QB and middle linebacker would satisfy their player base. I got this game and thought it was so cool for about 1 week and then realized, oh this is literally all I can do. It’s like getting held on a leash and told to watch and imagine the potential of the game be wasted. Not worth the money at all even if you’re a very big NFL fan, just wait for somebody else to get the game right.

This game gets boring really fast and is so buggy. The devs update it once every blue moon and when they do it's only a roster update. Never anything their community actually wants. Everyone wants the same things to be added (more positions and stuff) but they don't listen or give any updates on what they think about the community's ideas. They are so lazy and don't know how to keep their game fun. It sucks that not much love, effort, and care goes into this game. It has so much potential. Even if they fixed bugs, it would be better, but they just don't seem to care. For sure not worth $20+.
